items.name: Genji Pie Snacks - Deep Roasted Coffee
items.merchantDescription: Munch on this heart-shaped treat that's perfect for adults! It's made by crushing deep-fried coffee beans, kneading them into the dough, and baking them. Made with Colombian coffee, this snack has a rich aroma! Contains 17 pieces

items.merchantDescription: Stash away this pack of bite-sized chocolate bars in your candy cabinet! Each crunchy piece has crumbly waffle bits, butter cookie crumbles, Canadian maple, and chocolate made with French milk.

items.name: Morinaga Aloe Yogurt Sandwich Cookies

items.name: Nissin Crunchy Choco Flakes
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the delicious crunchy texture of this chocolate-coated corn cereal! It features a special double-blend chocolate made with mild Ghanaian cacao and fragrant Ecuadorian cacao. This treat even contains iron and calcium, so it's a healthy snack!

items.name: Senjaku Ogura Toast Candy
items.merchantDescription: Enjoy the classic taste of ogura or red bean toast in candy form! This delicious candy has a well-balanced combination of bread, ogura paste, and butter flavors.

items.name: Frito-Lay Mike Popcorn - Kishu Plum

items.name: Bourbon Elise Wafer Sticks - Japanese Chestnut
